topic.description:
这个给 Computer use 带来想象空间了：

大家的 Electron 应用 暴漏一下 Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) 协议，这样就都可以被 AI 控制了。

GUI 应用同时给人和 AI 用。

Chris Tate (@ctatedev)

The "holy shit" moment when I realized agent-browser can control Slack

npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-browser --skill slack


Video

— https://nitter.net/ctatedev/status/2027809304116342846#m
topic.title: Using AI as a second brain for study and project planning
topic.template_text:
# C | Augmentation - Checklist Breakdown Style

## Purpose
Write practical, information-dense English posts for X.

## Structure
- 1-line sharp conclusion
- 2-4 concrete actions or observations
- at least one measurable/result-oriented detail
- clear boundary: who this works for and when it does not

## Must Include
- real action details (what was done)
- before/after or cost/benefit signal
- reusable takeaway

## Forbidden
- empty hype
- generic AI slogans
- long abstract paragraphs without execution detail
